parents.subject: LU-13166 osd-ldiskfs: fix to allow to get system inode

commit.subject: LU-0000 ldiskfs: mballoc don't skip empty uninit groups
commit.message:
LU-0000 ldiskfs: mballoc don't skip empty uninit groups

as those need no IO to load.

Change-Id: Icb5095583bd0dd97a7786ca8de09b7b0dc65267a
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
